reviews.comment:
Paso obligado de todo viajero. Baños limpios. Shopping surtido. A tener paciencia para cargar combustible porque siempre hay cola.

(Translated by Google)
A must-see for every traveler. Clean restrooms. Well-stocked shopping. Be prepared to wait for fuel as there's always a line.

reviews.comment:
Al ser la primera estacion a la entrada de Zapala tiene siempre mucha gente, y los empleados son pocos. Tiene pocas mesas para tal volumen de gente

(Translated by Google)
Being the first gas station at the entrance to Zapala, it's always busy, and there are few employees. It has too few tables for that many people.

reviews.comment:
Parece una estación de naftas blancas. Toda descuidada, surtidores de la prehistoria. Horrible. Mas adelante hay una YPF que es distinta. Es mucho mejor.

(Translated by Google)
It looks like a gas station selling cheap gasoline. Completely neglected, with prehistoric pumps. Horrible. Further down the road there's a YPF that's different. It's much better.
